data.name: Red Ops: The First Infection
data.detailed_description:
Red Ops : The First Infection is an engaging ​BL/yaoi visual novel (18+) ​featuring hardships, world-ending events, zombies, love and intimacy. Follow our characters as they embrace their sexuality and explore their newfound romance.

SYNOPSIS

RED, a private organization, hire Zach and Chris for a covert ops mission. As the story progresses, our protagonists uncover the identity of a deadly virus – a virus, whose sole intent is to transform humans into man-eating monsters. Follow Zach and Chris as they uncover the origins of the man-made disease and stop a zombie apocalypse from happening – will they succeed?

GAME FEATURES

  • ≈57k words (4 to 6 hours)
  • 25+ CGs
  • Enticing romance
  • 9 erotic scenes
  • 1 polyamory scene
  • Original soundtrack
  • And so much more!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

  • 作業系統: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
